info.description: This is the API for Starlex web-site
info.title: Starlex API

post.description: Auth if user created and verified
Refresh access token using refresh token
Register new user and send verification email
Resend verification code to user email

get.description: Retrieves a single folder by its unique identifier passed as a query parameter. Requires JWT authentication.

post.description: Creates a new folder for the authenticated user. Requires JWT authentication.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a folder by the provided folder ID. Requires JWT authentication.

get.description: Returns all folders owned by the currently authenticated user. User ID is extracted from the JWT token.
get.summary: Get folders of the authenticated user

put.description: Changes the parent folder of an existing folder, effectively moving it in the folder tree. Requires JWT authentication.
put.summary: Move a folder to a new parent

parameters.description: Folder ID and target parent folder ID
parameters.name: move

get.description: Returns all child folders of a given parent folder passed as a query parameter. Requires JWT authentication.
get.summary: Get sub-folders by parent folder ID

get.description: Returns all folders belonging to a specific team. Requires JWT authentication.

put.description: Updates folder fields (name, color, icon, position, etc.) by providing the full folder payload with the target ID. Requires JWT authentication.

get.description: Returns a list of all tasks for a given team.

post.description: Remove user from team by userId (only team owner)
Add user to team by email (only team owner)

get.description: Returns a list of all tasks for a given team.

post.description: Creates a new task within the specified team. Requires JWT authentication.

put.description: Updates the 'Progress' field of an existing task by ID. Requires JWT authentication.

400.description: Bad request, missing fields, or invalid progress value

get.description: Returns a list of all tasks assigned to a specific user.

post.description: Uploads a photo file for a specific user

photo_url.description: Keep snake_case for photo_url as it's used in frontend
